HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

35class GreenF {
36 protected:
37 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
38 // Medium parameters
39 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
40 dcmplx wavelength;
41 dcmplx k_B;
42 std::vector<dcmplx> k_L;
43
44 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
45 // erfc() lookup table (optional acceleration)
46 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
47 LookupTableBin* t;
48 bool thereIsNoLookupTable;
49
50 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
51 // Global switches
52 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
53 static bool NeedsAccurate;
54 static int Etm;
55
56 public:
57 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
58 // Construction & lifetime
59 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
65 GreenF(dcmplx wavelength, dcmplx epsilonMedium);
66
72 GreenF(dcmplx wavelength, const std::vector<dcmplx>& epsilonMedium);
73
80 GreenF(dcmplx wavelength, dcmplx epsilonMedium, dcmplx muMedium);
81
88 GreenF(dcmplx wavelength,
89 const std::vector<dcmplx>& epsilonMedium,
90 const std::vector<dcmplx>& muMedium);
91
93 virtual ~GreenF();
94
95 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
96 // Pointwise kernel evaluation
97 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
104 virtual dcmplx Evaluate(rvec r, rvec rp) = 0;
105
112 virtual cvec Gradient(rvec r, rvec rp) = 0;
113
120 virtual cdyad EvaluateDyadic(rvec r, rvec rp) = 0;
121
122 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
123 // RWG‑weighted integrals for MoM/SIE assembly
124 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
132 virtual dcmplx IntegrateD(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp) = 0;
133
141 virtual dcmplx IntegrateK(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp) = 0;
142
143 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
144 // Post‑processing (fields from solved currents)
145 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
152 virtual cvec IntegrateDelta(rvec r, RWGFun* fp) = 0;
153
160 virtual cvec IntegrateKappa(rvec r, RWGFun* fp) = 0;
161
168 virtual std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> PairD(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp) = 0;
169
176 virtual std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> PairK(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp) = 0;
177
178 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
179 // D and K matrix elements computation
180 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
187 virtual void SameTriDK(const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fvec,
188 const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
189 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>>& DK) = 0;
190
198 virtual void SameTriDKG(const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fvec,
199 const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
200 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>>& DK,
201 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<cvec, cvec>>>& DKG) = 0;
202
209 virtual void SameTriDeltaKappa(rvec r, const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
210 std::vector<std::pair<cvec, cvec>>& DeltaKappa) = 0;
211
212 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
213 // Utilities
214 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
218 dcmplx WaveVec();
219
225 dcmplx EvErfc(dcmplx z);
226
232 int InitLookupTable(LookupTableBin* t);
233
235 static void EnableAccurate();
236
240 static bool RequiresAccurate();
241
246 static void AssignEtm(int n);
247
254 dcmplx GetLayerWavenumber(size_t index) const;
255
260 std::vector<dcmplx> GetLayersWavenumbers() const;
261};
262
271dcmplx csqrt(dcmplx arg);
272
273#endif
